name: IRC_AGENT_REQUISITIONS
description: The IRC_AGENT_REQUISITIONS will store the requisitions to which the agencies are invited to submit candidates

columns.Name: AGENT_REQUISITION_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key of the table. System generated.

columns.Name: REQUISITION_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the REQUISITION_ID to which the Agent is invited to submit candidate profiles. Foreign key to IRC_REQUISITIONS_B table.

columns.Name: AGENT_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the AGENT_ID of the Agent who is invited to submit candidate profiles to the requisition. Foreign key to IRC_AGENTS table.

columns.Name: AGENCY_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the AGENCY_ID of the Agency who is invited to submit candidate profiles to the requisition. Foreign key to IRC_AGENCIES table.

columns.Name: INVITED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores if the Agency is invited to Apply for the Requisition

columns.Name: DO_NOT_EXPIRE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores the flag that decides  the invite to the agent for the requisition never expires or not.

columns.Name: EXPIRATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores the date on which the invite to the agent for the requisition expires.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
